title: lichen-rpl: Non-Storing routing table + DAO manager
description: routing.rs + dao manager: port of Python routing.py + dao.py. Root receives DAOs, extracts RPL Target + Transit Information options, builds parent_map, assembles chain target->parent->...->root, installs source route in RoutingTable. DAO sender side builds the DAO to send. Tests: 4-node tree → root has routes; source route to deep node is correct.
